reviews.review_title: I goto keep going for faster times.
reviews.review_description:
The demo is fun, nice job

It's a quick demo but you can restart at the end to go for a faster time. This is where the replay value is.
I need that faster time and it's addictive especially if you think you got a fast time but if you hit any of the red hostages  you will instantly scream out loud like I did nooooo F*********k and you start from the beginning again. 
The pressure of the timer that you don't see till the end is a nice touch as you don't know till the end what your time is, so every second counts and you know it as you play

Would be 5stars if maybe a leaderboard or something but for a demo it's fine

EDIT: ***THE FULL GAME IS NOW FREE ON SIDE QUEST ***
